description: Long account in Judaeo-Arabic. Of persons to whom pitch (zift) was sold, headed by a general (al-qāʾid Abū Tamīm), the representative of an amir (Yūḥannas wakīl al-amīr), and a government secretary (Abū l-ʿAlāʾ al-kātib). Further down there is a soldier (al-jundī). Obviously(?) all buyers had taken the commodity on credit. Ends with a note about the amount remaining with the broker. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: חשבון ארוך של אנשים שנמכרה להם זפת, בראשות כותרת כללית
